query:
SELECT 
  symbol,
  short_strike,
  long_strike,
  expiration,
  net_credit,
  spread_width,
  ROUND((net_credit / spread_width) * 100, 2) AS roc_pct,
  short_delta,
  short_bid,
  short_ask,
  long_bid,
  long_ask,
  iv_rank,
  score,
  created_at
FROM bcs_opportunities
WHERE symbol = 'SPXW'
ORDER BY roc_pct DESC, score DESC
LIMIT 30;
